_doc: Rise time at V_LOW%-V_HIGH% of the auto-detected envelope of the full (unclipped) waveform. Same shape as rise_time_auto but without the t_1..t_2 window — use when you want rise time over the entire analysis interval. Follows the i_avg_window / i_avg_full naming convention.
name: rise_time_auto_full
expression: average(riseTime(vtime('$ANALYSIS "$SIG") ymin(vtime('$ANALYSIS "$SIG")) nil ymax(vtime('$ANALYSIS "$SIG")) nil $V_LOW $V_HIGH t "time"))
